characters.name: Alpha Squadron
characters.description: Alpha Squadron Elvyloses her entire squadron in thefirst episode'sattack to getAyatoout of Tokyo Jupiter, know asOperation Overlord, and a new group of pilots is taken on as replacements in episode 7; these pilots are all longtime associates of Elvy's. They are first equipped withadvanced fighter planes andeventually receiveVermillionsfrom theBähbem Foundation. They do not appear in the manga or movie versions. Seiyū: Fumioki. Voice actor: James Faulkner

characters.name: Alpha Squadron

characters.name: Ayato Kamina
characters.description: Ayato KaminaFirst appearanceOver LordVital StatisticsAge17 (Biological)Height166cm[1](5ft 5in)Weight50kg[1](110 lbs)FamilyMotherMaya KaminaFatherShirow WatariPartnerHaruka Shitow(Wife)SiblingsItsuki Kisaragi(brother)Voice actorsSeiyūHiro ShimonoEnglishChris PattonFrenchFabien Briche Ayato Kamina(神名 綾人Kamina Ayato) is a student and artist who lives withMaya KaminainTokyo. Most of his artwork shown in the series consists of drawings or paintings of a girl on a cliff looking towards the sea. He hasbirthmark-like symbols on his belly that resemblesrunes, which are revealed to be a sign of his being a potential instrumentalist for the mysterious giant godly being calledthe RahXephon. Ayato had painted a picture of a girl with her back turned and his encounter withReika Mishima, who looks remarkably like the girl in the painting, leads him to the Rahxephon. In time, he will interact with many people and grow from those experiences.

characters.name: Buchi
characters.description: BuchiFirst appearanceWelcome to Our Town Buchiis a cat found byHaruka ShitowandAyato Kaminain the ruins surroundingTokyo Jupiter. A brown and white cat, Buchi had been surviving alone in the ruins surrounding Tokyo Jupiter. After Ayato and Haruka broke the barrier and landed in the area withRahXephonhe was discovered and taken on board the boat they were using as a shelter.

AutenFrenchSusan Sindberg An ace pilot of theEarth Federation, originally from Indonesia, she is drinking buddies withHarukaand is somewhat of a bad drunk. She is later assigned toTERRA. (エルフィ・ハディヤットErufi Hadiyatto)

characters.name: Ernst von Bähbem
characters.description: Ernst von BähbemFirst appearanceLost Songs Forgotten MelodiesVital StatisticsDate of BirthUnknownAgeUnknownFactionBähbem FoundationVoice actorsSeiyūIemasa KayumiEnglishTed PfisterFrenchThierry Kazazian His age is unknown. The present head of the Bähbem Foundation. There is a rumor that he has been the head ever since the company was originally established as Naacal Trading Company in 1576. With the technology derived from applying the excavated OOPARTs and the patents for that technology, he controls the world's economy from behind the scenes, leading this old man to be called a modern-day Rasputin. He is a sponsor ofTERRA, and he has a great deal of influence. Ernst von Bähbem, also called The Designer, is the cloned host body of an ancientMulian. His practice of cloning himself has some characters mistakenly calling him a modern Methuselah. Bähbem was responsible for the continent of Mu disappearing into another dimension, and he seeks to rectify the situation by having the world "re-tuned" before the dimensions destroy each other and turn into "mud." Bähbem seems not to care about whether the humans or the Mu are the ones that will succeed in the tuning, or indeed care about the people that he uses to attain his goals. He is later shot and killed byJohji Futagami.

characters.name: Gomi Masaru
characters.description: Gomi MasaruVital StatisticsDate of Birth2002Age25FactionTERRA Operator inTERRA's Tactical Division. His personality is calm and composed. He is younger than he looks.

characters.name: Haruka Shitow
characters.description: Haruka ShitowFirst appearanceOver LordVital StatisticsDate of BirthApril 9, 1998Age29FamilyPartnerAyato Kamina(Husband)SiblingsMegumi Shitow(Little Sister)Voice actorsSeiyūAya HisakawaEnglishMonica Rial (English)Mandy Clark (English;Young)FrenchAgnès Manaury The woman, who has been observing and trackingAyatofrom afar. She is the one who saves Ayato when he is about to get taken away by agents from the Department of Public Safety. She tries to get close to Ayato by telling him that she will "tell him the truth". A 29 year old officer within theTERRAorganization, Haruka Shitow is partially responsible for aiding Ayato in leaving Tokyo Jupiter. Originally a Major in the Intelligence Division, she is promoted to Captain in the Tactical Division.

characters.name: Haruka Shitow
characters.description: Haruka ShitowFirst appearanceOver LordVital StatisticsDate of BirthApril 9, 1998Age29FamilyPartnerAyato Kamina(Husband)SiblingsMegumi Shitow(Little Sister)Voice actorsSeiyūAya HisakawaEnglishMonica Rial (English)Mandy Clark (English;Young)FrenchAgnès Manaury The woman, who has been observing and trackingAyatofrom afar. She is the one who saves Ayato when he is about to get taken away by agents from the Department of Public Safety. She tries to get close to Ayato by telling him that she will "tell him the truth". A 29 year old officer within theTERRAorganization, Haruka Shitow is partially responsible for aiding Ayato in leaving Tokyo Jupiter. Originally a Major in the Intelligence Division, she is promoted to Captain in the Tactical Division.

characters.name: Helena von Bähbem
characters.description: Helena von BähbemFirst appearanceResonanceVital StatisticsDate of Birth1998Age29Voice actorsSeiyūMako HyōdōEnglishKelli CousinsFrenchPascale Chemin She isLord Bähbemniece and she also works as his secretary. It seems she has knownIsshiki MakotoandKisaragi Itsukisince they were young. She delivers theVermilliontoNirai-Kanaias an envoy of the foundation. Helena von Bähbem is the niece ofErnst von Bähbem. A childhood acquaintance ofMakoto IsshikiandItsuki Kisaragi, she serves as the second in command in theBähbem Foundation. In addition to being a childhood dabbler in witchcraft, she was a potential instrumentalist, but passed the ideal age without realizing her potential. This makes her jealous ofQuonand others that might succeed in tuning the world. She eventually allows Ernst von Bähbem to take over her body.

characters.name: Helena von Bähbem
characters.description: Helena von BähbemFirst appearanceResonanceVital StatisticsDate of Birth1998Age29Voice actorsSeiyūMako HyōdōEnglishKelli CousinsFrenchPascale Chemin She isLord Bähbemniece and she also works as his secretary. characters.name: Hiroko Asahina
characters.description: Hiroko Asahina朝比奈 浩子 Asahina HirokoVital StatisticsDate of Birth1998Age17Voice actorsSeiyūYumi KakazuEnglishCynthia Martinez Hirokois one of Ayato's classmates. She agonizes over the fact that her blood has turned blue and is unable to completely hide her feelings of uncertainty. She escapes from Tokyo together withAyato, and they begin a life together. Hiroko Asahina is a classmate and friend ofAyatoandMamoru Torigai. During the attack on Tokyo, she is lightly injured, and bleeds red blood; the injury requiring three stitches.[1]While Ayato is in the real world, herMuphase activates.

characters.name: Hiroko Asahina
characters.description: Hiroko Asahina朝比奈 浩子 Asahina HirokoVital StatisticsDate of Birth1998Age17Voice actorsSeiyūYumi KakazuEnglishCynthia Martinez Hirokois one of Ayato's classmates. Hiroko Asahina is a classmate and friend ofAyatoandMamoru Torigai. During the attack on Tokyo, she is lightly injured, and bleeds red blood; the injury requiring three stitches.[1]While Ayato is in the real world, herMuphase activates.

characters.name: Itsuki Kisaragi
characters.description: Itsuki Kisaragi如月 樹 Kisaragi ItsukiVoice actorsSeiyūMitsuru MiyamotoEnglishJay HickmanFrenchMartial Leminoux Itsuki Kisaragi is an urbane doctor withTERRAwho studies music and is part of the analysis team studying theRahXephon. He is also the adoptive brother ofQuon. Although most people do not know, he is actually aMulianandAyato'stwin brother, and his adoptive "sister's" biological son. LikeMegumi, he feels inferior to his sibling and struggles with his own worth throughout the series. He is unable to pilot the RahXephon, and once datedHaruka, who now rejects him. He was raised in theBähbem FoundationwithMakoto IsshikiandHelena Bähbem. Like Ayato and Quon, he bears the marks of a potential instrumentalist on his belly. In the movie, his character is reduced to being a love-sick guardian of the sleeping Quon.

characters.name: Itsuki Kisaragi
characters.description: Itsuki Kisaragi如月 樹 Kisaragi ItsukiVoice actorsSeiyūMitsuru MiyamotoEnglishJay HickmanFrenchMartial Leminoux Itsuki Kisaragi is an urbane doctor withTERRAwho studies music and is part of the analysis team studying theRahXephon. He is also the adoptive brother ofQuon. Although most people do not know, he is actually aMulianandAyato'stwin brother, and his adoptive "sister's" biological son. LikeMegumi, he feels inferior to his sibling and struggles with his own worth throughout the series. He is unable to pilot the RahXephon, and once datedHaruka, who now rejects him. He was raised in theBähbem FoundationwithMakoto IsshikiandHelena Bähbem. Like Ayato and Quon, he bears the marks of a potential instrumentalist on his belly. In the movie, his character is reduced to being a love-sick guardian of the sleeping Quon.

characters.name: Ixtli
characters.description: The Ixtili is the soul of the RahXephon. The appearance of the Ixtli changes due to who the Olin is. It is projected as the pilot's innermost desires, such as Ayato's Ixtli being a version of Haruka at a younger age, and Quon's being Ayato, her son.

characters.name: Jin Kunugi
characters.description: Jin Kunugi功刀 仁 Kunugi JinVoice actorsSeiyūGeorge NakataEnglishJohn GremillionFrenchEric Peter Jin Kunugiis the stern and quiet commander ofTERRA's military operations. He prefers delegating tasks to his subordinates and "managing by exception." Kunugi was an officer of the Japan Self-Defense Forces, under the command ofKuki Masayoshi, who ordered him to perform a nuclear strike on theMuin the town of Sendai. His daughterMichiruwas in the city and subsequently killed in the strike, and Kunugi became estranged from his wife. It is falsely stated in the anime that his wife is his daughter. It is revealed that Kuki was acting on behalf of the Mu (or some element within the Mu government), who wanted the humans to attack, providing justification for their further plans. Kunugi eventually stays behind afterNirai Kanaiis evacuated and activates a Jupiter device there, sacrificing himself to kill Kuki and destroy Largo, the Dolem which was bound to Kuki.

characters.name: Jin Kunugi
characters.description: Jin Kunugi功刀 仁 Kunugi JinVoice actorsSeiyūGeorge NakataEnglishJohn GremillionFrenchEric Peter Jin Kunugiis the stern and quiet commander ofTERRA's military operations. He prefers delegating tasks to his subordinates and "managing by exception." Kunugi was an officer of the Japan Self-Defense Forces, under the command ofKuki Masayoshi, who ordered him to perform a nuclear strike on theMuin the town of Sendai. characters.name: Johji Futagami
characters.description: Johji Futagami弐神 譲二 Futagami JõjiFirst appearanceLost Songs Forgotten MelodiesVital StatisticsAge36Voice actorsSeiyūKatsunosuke HoriEnglishAndy McAvinFrenchPatrick Bethune By all appearances nothing but a clever journalist, Johji Futagami is hired byTERRAto do coverage for purposes of public relations. However, his investigations extend much further than TERRA is aware of. Johji Futagami is a reporter from Amato News who is given exclusive press access toTERRA, making his way around the island ofNirai Kanaiasking questions of both principal characters and other local residents. Throughout the series, he is able to supply new information toHaruka, while being involved in investigative journalism. He eventually goes on his own hunt forAyatoandAsahinaafter their escape from Tokyo Jupiter. It is revealed that his real name is Jumonji Takeshi, and that he is a high ranking intelligence officer with the Earth Federation. In the endgame, he relays orders to the combinedTERRA/Federation fleet and tracks down and killsErnst von Bähbem.

characters.name: Johji Futagami
characters.description: Johji Futagami弐神 譲二 Futagami JõjiFirst appearanceLost Songs Forgotten MelodiesVital StatisticsAge36Voice actorsSeiyūKatsunosuke HoriEnglishAndy McAvinFrenchPatrick Bethune By all appearances nothing but a clever journalist, Johji Futagami is hired byTERRAto do coverage for purposes of public relations. characters.name: Kim Hotal
characters.description: Kim Hotal Staff atTERRA, secretly girlfriend ofYagumo. She kept it secret to not hurtMegumi, who is her best friend. Her parents killed byRitardandowhen it initially attacked Australia which is why she works at TERRA - as a way to exact revenge on theDolemsand theMulians. She gets aggressive atAyatoinitially because Ritardando returning gives her traumatic memories of the loss of her parents, so she takes it out on Ayato since she thinks he is somehow responsible for not stopping Ritardando the first time.

characters.name: Kim Hotal
characters.description: Kim Hotal Staff atTERRA, secretly girlfriend ofYagumo. She kept it secret to not hurtMegumi, who is her best friend. characters.name: Laila Costa
characters.description: Laila Costa One of Bähbem's body guards and assassins. She first appears in the show as a local islander in episode 12, giving a photojournalist a lift to a volcanic crater in the Philippines; her next appearance is with Bähbem in the final episodes of the show. She does not appear in the movie or manga.

characters.name: Makoto Isshiki
characters.description: Makoto Isshiki一色 真 Isshiki MakotoFirst appearanceWatch the Year HandVital StatisticsDate of Birth4 February 1998Age29Voice actorsSeiyūToshihiko SekiRomi Park (young)EnglishIllich GuardiolaKevin Corn (young)The observer sent in by theEarth Federation. He claims to be collaborating withTERRA. He tends to speak coldly to others, and his history is shrouded in mystery. Romi Park (young) Kevin Corn (young)

characters.name: Makoto Isshiki
characters.description: Makoto Isshiki一色 真 Isshiki MakotoFirst appearanceWatch the Year HandVital StatisticsDate of Birth4 February 1998Age29Voice actorsSeiyūToshihiko SekiRomi Park (young)EnglishIllich GuardiolaKevin Corn (young)The observer sent in by theEarth Federation. He claims to be collaborating withTERRA. He tends to speak coldly to others, and his history is shrouded in mystery. Romi Park (young) Kevin Corn (young)

characters.name: Mamoru Torigai
characters.description: Mamoru Torigai鳥飼 守 Torigai MamoruFirst appearanceOver LordVital StatisticsDate of Birth1998Age17Voice actorsSeiyūHirofumi NojimaEnglishVic Mignogna AsHiroko'sboyfriend andAyato's friend, he was always close by, but as aMulian, his real purpose was to monitor Ayato. Mamoru Torigai is another friend and classmate of Kamina's inTokyo Jupiter. He was seeingHiroko Asahinabefore she left Tokyo Jupiter with Ayato. Deep down, he dislikes Ayato because of Asahina's feelings for him. Mamoru is a true Mulian, likeErnst von Bähbem,Maya, andQuon, and holds a high position within the Mulian society. He follows Ayato toNirai Kanaithe second time he leaves Tokyo Jupiter and lives with Ayato for a short period of time. While in Nirai Kanai, Mamoru discovers that Asahina died. He blames Ayato for her death and fights the RahXephon with his Dolem Obbligato. His Dolem is no match forthe RahXephonand loses an arm in the battle. He returns with a fully repairedDolemand battles the RahXephon again, this time after Ayato had joined with the RahXephon, and dies in the battle. He is brought back to life, along with Asahina, when Ayato re-tunes the world.

characters.name: Mamoru Torigai
characters.description: Mamoru Torigai鳥飼 守 Torigai MamoruFirst appearanceOver LordVital StatisticsDate of Birth1998Age17Voice actorsSeiyūHirofumi NojimaEnglishVic Mignogna AsHiroko'sboyfriend andAyato's friend, he was always close by, but as aMulian, his real purpose was to monitor Ayato. characters.name: Masayoshi Kuki
characters.description: Masayoshi Kuki九鬼 正義 Kuki MasayoshiVoice actorsSeiyūHōchū ŌtsukaEnglishMike Vance Mu Tokyo Government General Defense Comander. A former Colonel of the Nation Defense, who defected to theMuside in theFirst Great Mu War. He controls theDolemLargo. Masayoshi Kuki appears as second in command to Maya in Tokyo Jupiter. He sometimes questions Maya's orders and also shows some disapproval of how she treatsAyato. It is revealed that Kuki was the JSDF officer that orderedJin Kunugito perform the nuclear strike on theMuin theGreat Mu War. Kuki attacks Nirai-Kanai with theDolemLargo, and appears invincible to its defense systems. Kunugi, however, activates aJupiter device, killing Kuki and enacting his revenge before dying of his injuries.

characters.name: Maya Kamina
characters.description: Maya KaminaFirst appearanceOver LordFamilySiblingsQuon Kisaragi(Sister)Ayato Kamina(Adopted SonBiological Nephew)Voice actorsSeiyūIchiko HashimotoEnglishLaura Chapman Biological Nephew) Maya Kamina(神名 麻弥Kamina Maya) isAyato Kamina's mother who is often away from home which leaves Ayato feeling neglected and wishing to spend more time with her. Although Ayato initially believes she works in a lab, she is actually a very powerfulMulianleader. Just before Ayato leaves Tokyo Jupiter for the first time, Maya is injured by flying debris, and Ayato is severely rattled when he sees her blue blood. From then on, he is fearful and mistrusting of her. Maya reveals that she is actually Ayato's aunt, and that she adopted Ayato. She was originally sent to the human world along with her sisterQuon Kisaragi(Ayato's biological mother). The only Mulian that was there before them wasErnst von Bähbem. Maya was raised byShougo Rikudowhile Quon slept in the care of Bähbem. Maya married Rikudo's research assistant,Shirow Watari. When Maya's Mu phase awakened, she left her husband and joined the Mu.

characters.name: Maya Kamina
characters.description: Maya KaminaFirst appearanceOver LordFamilySiblingsQuon Kisaragi(Sister)Ayato Kamina(Adopted SonBiological Nephew)Voice actorsSeiyūIchiko HashimotoEnglishLaura Chapman Biological Nephew) Maya Kamina(神名 麻弥Kamina Maya) isAyato Kamina's mother who is often away from home which leaves Ayato feeling neglected and wishing to spend more time with her. Although Ayato initially believes she works in a lab, she is actually a very powerfulMulianleader. Just before Ayato leaves Tokyo Jupiter for the first time, Maya is injured by flying debris, and Ayato is severely rattled when he sees her blue blood. From then on, he is fearful and mistrusting of her. Maya reveals that she is actually Ayato's aunt, and that she adopted Ayato. She was originally sent to the human world along with her sisterQuon Kisaragi(Ayato's biological mother). The only Mulian that was there before them wasErnst von Bähbem. Maya was raised byShougo Rikudowhile Quon slept in the care of Bähbem. Maya married Rikudo's research assistant,Shirow Watari. When Maya's Mu phase awakened, she left her husband and joined the Mu.

characters.name: Megumi Shitow
characters.description: Megumi ShitowFirst appearanceOn Earth As It Is In HeavenVital StatisticsDate of BirthApril 14, 2013Age14FactionTERRAVoice actorsSeiyūAyako KawasumiEnglishHilary HaagFrenchBérangère JeanATERRATactical Division operator in training. Shitow Megumi isHaruka'syounger half-sister, and has a bright and energetic personality but she has withdrawn from school and has a complex about her older sister. Megumi Shitow is Haruka's younger half-sister. She initially protestsAyatoliving with her, Haruka, and their uncle, but she does her best to help Ayato feel at home, developing a crush on Ayato as the series progresses. She often serves pocky and other snacks, and introduces Ayato to Ramune. Although seemingly energetic and upbeat, she has many internal issues. She did not fit in well in school, so she joined TERRA as a trainee. She would later be promoted to the rank of a full officer. She initially has a crush onSoichi Yakumo, but gives up on him when she finds out that he is seeing her friend,Kim Hotal. She feels as if she is constantly living in her sister's shadow, and this comes to a head when she learns that Ayato and Haruka had a relationship when they were younger, as by the end of the series she has developed a crush on Ayato.

characters.name: Megumi Shitow
characters.description: Megumi ShitowFirst appearanceOn Earth As It Is In HeavenVital StatisticsDate of BirthApril 14, 2013Age14FactionTERRAVoice actorsSeiyūAyako KawasumiEnglishHilary HaagFrenchBérangère JeanATERRATactical Division operator in training. She initially has a crush onSoichi Yakumo, but gives up on him when she finds out that he is seeing her friend,Kim Hotal. She feels as if she is constantly living in her sister's shadow, and this comes to a head when she learns that Ayato and Haruka had a relationship when they were younger, as by the end of the series she has developed a crush on Ayato.

characters.name: Michiru
characters.description: Michiru The Blue bird thatCommander Kunugikeeps in his private chambers.Vice Commander Yagumooften feeds it. it is named after Kunugi's dead daughter, who he himself killed.

characters.name: Quon Kisaragi
characters.description: Quon Kisaragi如月 久遠 Kisaragi Kuon, Quon al PadisFirst appearanceOver LordVital StatisticsAge16 (series start)17 (series end)FamilySiblingsItsuki Kisaragi (Adoptive Brotherin reality son)Ayato Kamina(son)Voice actorsSeiyūHouko KuwashimaEnglishKira Vincent-DavisFrenchCelia Charpentier in reality son)Ayato Kamina(son) Quon is the younger sister ofItsuki Kisaragi, head ofTERRA'SScientific Analysis Department. She is a mysterious girl, who wears a life module around her chest and murmurs words that sound like poetry every so often.

characters.name: Quon Kisaragi
characters.description: Quon Kisaragi如月 久遠 Kisaragi Kuon, Quon al PadisFirst appearanceOver LordVital StatisticsAge16 (series start)17 (series end)FamilySiblingsItsuki Kisaragi (Adoptive Brotherin reality son)Ayato Kamina(son)Voice actorsSeiyūHouko KuwashimaEnglishKira Vincent-DavisFrenchCelia Charpentier in reality son)Ayato Kamina(son) Quon is the younger sister ofItsuki Kisaragi, head ofTERRA'SScientific Analysis Department. She is a mysterious girl, who wears a life module around her chest and murmurs words that sound like poetry every so often.

characters.name: Reika Mishima
characters.description: Reika Mishima美嶋 玲香 Mishima Reika, IxtliFirst appearanceOver LordVital StatisticsDate of Birth1998Age17Voice actorsSeiyūMaaya SakamotoEnglishMandy ClarkFrenchNathalie Homs Reika Mishima(Japanese: 美嶋 玲香,Mishima Reika) is the Ixtli for theRahXephon. Seemingly a classmate ofAyato Kamina's, Reika is in fact Ayato's distorted memories ofHaruka Shitowmanifested. First appearing in the rubble ofTokyo, duringTERRA's attack on the city. She does not have a reflection unless she needs to, she calls Ayato from an unassigned phone number, and she appears to alter Ayato's classmates' memories to make them remember her. She later appears as an aide toMakoto Isshiki, apparently altering TERRA personnels' memories in the same fashion.

characters.name: Reika Mishima
characters.description: Reika Mishima美嶋 玲香 Mishima Reika, IxtliFirst appearanceOver LordVital StatisticsDate of Birth1998Age17Voice actorsSeiyūMaaya SakamotoEnglishMandy ClarkFrenchNathalie Homs Reika Mishima(Japanese: 美嶋 玲香,Mishima Reika) is the Ixtli for theRahXephon. Seemingly a classmate ofAyato Kamina's, Reika is in fact Ayato's distorted memories ofHaruka Shitowmanifested. First appearing in the rubble ofTokyo, duringTERRA's attack on the city. She does not have a reflection unless she needs to, she calls Ayato from an unassigned phone number, and she appears to alter Ayato's classmates' memories to make them remember her. She later appears as an aide toMakoto Isshiki, apparently altering TERRA personnels' memories in the same fashion.

characters.name: Sayoko Nanamori
characters.description: Sayoko Nanamori七森 小夜子 Nanamori Sayoko, "Sacchin"First appearanceOn Earth As It Is In HeavenVital StatisticsDate of Birth1999Age28Voice actorsSeiyūAtsuko TanakaEnglishKelly Manison Sayoko Nanamoriis the 28 year old research assistant ofItsuki Kisaragiwho is shown to hold unrequited feelings for Itsuki, and to react angrily if anyone touches on the subject. This leads to a small running gag in the series: Whenever she is particularly upset about Itsuki, the windscreen wiper on her car is shown to make an interval swipe on its own. Episode 8 revolves around Itsuki giving Nanamori a crystal pendant as a Christmas gift; the crystal (taken from the remains of the Dolem Forzando grows into the Dolem Sforzando, absorbs Nanamori, and alters the weather on Nirai Kanai to create blizzard-like conditions matching the state of Nanamori's feelings. She is freed byAyato Kaminain the RahXephon, and later enters into a relationship with Makoto Isshiki and supplies him with information, thus unwittingly keeping the Bähbem Foundation abreast of Quon's status. Nanamori struggles with memories of her family, but it is later revealed that she was given false memories and was programmed byHelena von Bähbemto love Itsuki. Nanamori ends up killing Itsuki by stabbing him, but she kills herself after she was distraught over Itsuki's murder and the truth of her false memories. Nanamori ends up killing Itsuki by stabbing him. Distraught over Itsuki's murder and the truth of her false memories, she kills herself.

characters.name: Shinobu Miwa
characters.description: Shinobu Miwa三輪 忍 Miwa ShinobuFirst appearanceOver LordVoice actorsSeiyūYu AsakawaEnglishHeather Bryson LeMaster Shinobu Miwa appears to be third in command in the Tokyo Bay base control center. She is shown working with Kuki in the control center, and holding down the fort with other subordinates while Kuki and Maya are away. At the end of the series, Miwa briefly expresses doubt over the Mu agenda before finally becoming bound to the Dolem Allegretto. In the movie, Miwa appears briefly in the base.

characters.name: Shinobu Miwa

characters.name: Shirow Watari
characters.description: Shirow Watari亘理 士郎 Watari ShirōFirst appearanceAwakeningVoice actorsSeiyūKenji UtsumiEnglishMike Kleinhenz Shirow Watari is the third coordinating with the Bähbem Foundation. Though his public persona is as stern and serious as that of his friendJin Kunugi, he is more cheerful around the other TERRA employees; the souvenirs he buys for the employees is a running joke in the series. Watari was the assistant of Professor Rikudo, and they found Quon and Maya together. Shirow Kamina eventually married Maya, but he changed his family name to Watari after Maya had gone over to the Mu. Watari is the biological father ofAyatoandItsuki. Although hesitant to meet Ayato, during his first meeting he subtly alludes to their relationship but is completely ignored.

characters.name: Shirow Watari
characters.description: Shirow Watari亘理 士郎 Watari ShirōFirst appearanceAwakeningVoice actorsSeiyūKenji UtsumiEnglishMike Kleinhenz Shirow Watari is the third coordinating with the Bähbem Foundation. Although hesitant to meet Ayato, during his first meeting he subtly alludes to their relationship but is completely ignored.

characters.name: Shougo Rikudo
characters.description: Professor Shougo Rikudo六道 翔吾 Rikudō ShōgoFirst appearanceOn Earth As It Is In HeavenVoice actorsSeiyūChikao OhtsukaEnglishJohn Swasey Shougo Rikudo is a retired archaeologist living inNirai-Kanai. He isHarukaandMegumi Shitow's uncle, and welcomesAyatointo his household. Soft-spoken and wise, he helps to ground the other characters. He is an expert at shogi, the Japanese equivalent of chess, and at Japanese calligraphy (shodo). It is revealed that it was Professor Rikudo and his assistantShirow Watariwho foundMayaandQuonat the shrine, and that Maya was raised as Rikudo's adoptive daughter. Rikudo has an equally prominent position in the movie as in the series, and he takes on a greater importance in telling the story. In the movie, he is the one to encourage Haruka to join Ayato. He does not appear in the manga.

characters.name: Shougo Rikudo
characters.description: Professor Shougo Rikudo六道 翔吾 Rikudō ShōgoFirst appearanceOn Earth As It Is In HeavenVoice actorsSeiyūChikao OhtsukaEnglishJohn Swasey Shougo Rikudo is a retired archaeologist living inNirai-Kanai. He does not appear in the manga.

characters.name: Soichi Yakumo
characters.description: Soichi YakumoVital StatisticsAge22Voice actorsFrenchAlexandre Olivier He isTERRA'S Strategic Operations Vice Commander and his rank is Major. He takes over the Command inKunugi'sabsence. He is always smiling, but he is a dependable man at heart. He isKim'ssecret boyfriend, and the two seem very happy together from the few scenes they share. Lieutenant of TERRA at 22 years old. Second in command at TERRA and has a big role near the end of the series in framingMakotoand getting him fired. AfterElvyfinds out Ayato is a Mulian the two have a loud argument, and Ayato overhears, which is the first time he actually realises he is a Mulian. Souichi is clearly fond ofAyatoand believes that regardless of whether or not Ayato is a Mulian, he is still himself and thus, should be looked at as an individual. Yagumo gives him a heart to heart telling him that its who he is that matters and not the colour of his blood.
